items.claim: Nurullo Aliev is 5'10" with a 72-inch reach.
Nurullo Aliev employs a high-pressure wrestling style with good control and a high pace.
items.quote: He's got the forward pressure. He's got excellent wrestling, very good control, and he puts you in a highpace blender type of fight

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev's striking has improved since entering the UFC.
items.quote: his striking, I feel like, has actually gotten a lot better since he's came into the UFC

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev has not yet faced the highest level of competition in the division.
items.quote: So, he hasn't fought the best
